_publications._publicationTitle: Interpreting mammalian target of rapamycin and cell growth inhibition in a genetically engineered mouse model of Nf1-deficient astrocytes.
_publications._context: The mouse K4622 grade II glioma cell line was derived from a C57Bl/6 Nf1+/−; p53+/− mouse and was shown to be both Nf1- and p53-deficient

basicInfo.cellLineName: K4622 grade II glioma cell line
